subject: A female-presenting figure with braided hair embraces the head of a large dark dragon, smiling warmly; the dragon's eyes glow orange
description: A female-presenting humanoid figure leans into the massive head of a dark-scaled dragon, her arm wrapped around its snout in an affectionate embrace. She is smiling broadly, her expression warm and confident. Her hair appears braided or twisted and her outfit is dark, form-fitting with a shoulder cut-out. The dragon's scales are near-black with deep amber-orange glowing eyes; its teeth are visible but its expression reads as tolerant or fond. Behind them an overcast blue-grey sky fills the background, with a hint of the dragon's wings. The composition emphasizes the bond between trainer and creature — an intimate moment with something enormous.
background: overcast blue-grey sky, dragon wing visible
